title: fimbristylis autumnalis var. microcarya
intro: Fimbristylis autumnalis var. microcarya, also known as the autumn fan sedge or Microcarya fan sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fimbristylis autumnalis var. microcarya include treating fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
